From Nothing

Progressive Metalcore  ·  Montana
ListenBook Us
Biography

From Nothing is a Progressive Metalcore band based out of Montana.

Founding members Randal and Josh set out to create technically appealing music with compelling storytelling. The band's most recent track, "Usurper," sets the precedent that many people can expect to hear within the music. From Nothing is continuing their musical trajectory in their upcoming album, "Macabre."

From Nothing's talent gave them the opportunity to play with larger bands such as From Ashes to New, Hawthorne Heights, and Angelmaker. Their live performance has garnered hundreds of dedicated fans that crave the intensity that they bring to every show. They also have reached thousands of listeners across multiple platforms like Spotify and Apple Music.

Based: Montana
Formed: 2019
Genre: Progressive Metalcore

Technical

Stage Plot & Input List

    Input List

  • Main Vox → Splitter (wireless)
  • Guitar 1 (Randal) → Pedalboard → Splitter
  • Guitar 2 (Dom) → Pedalboard → Splitter
  • Bass (Carter) → Bass head → Splitter
  • Drums (Simon) → FOH-miked
  • Laptop (click + tracks) → Digital Mixer
  • Digital Mixer → Wireless IEMs + FOH

    What We Need

  • 7× XLR
